rows.label: qev030503_MSG0001
rows.name:
Quega... I want to see you, na... I
want you to hold me tight, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030503_MSG0003
rows.name:
You are... from BLADE? I don't have
anything to ask of you, na... In a world
without him, I have no more desires... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030503_MSG0004
rows.name:
In the past, I used to wear the
beautiful clothes Quega made for
me and dance all day long, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030503_MSG0005
rows.name:
But that was because I wanted him to be
happy. There's no longer any meaning in
dancing in a world without him, na... [ST:wait ]
